title: pelargonium multicaule
intro: Pelargonium multicaule, also known as the "Rose Geranium" or "Bath's Mist", is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family that is native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium multicaule include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
